results.rendered_html: jvalita mfn. lighted, blazing, flaming, shining,  MBh.  (tṛṇeṣu jvalitaṃ tvayā, ‘you have lighted flames in the grass’, i.e. you have had an easy work, v, 7089 ) &c.
